features: resolution corrected: this is a 4MP/2K fixed-lens model, not 8MP/4K with 3x zoom -- prior stored spec (8MP, 4.1-12.3mm 3x zoom, 60m IR) was fabricated/conflated with a different AI-tier model

sensor size, exact power consumption, and weight not fully confirmed -- techspecs.ui.com page for this specific model was not reliably fetchable (consistently redirected to a generic category listing); values above are cross-referenced across multiple partial official-source lookups

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
